title: Get in touch
subtitle: We reply to all messages within 24 hours on business days.

support.title: Need help?
support.description: For questions about how to use InvesTax, technical issues, or anything not working as expected.

general.title: Other questions?
general.description: For partnerships, feedback, business inquiries, or anything else.

form.heading: Send us a message
form.subheading: Fill in the form below. We reply to the email address you provide.
form.name: Your name
form.messagePlaceholder: Briefly describe what you need. If it is about a calculation issue, mention the statement type (Trading 212 PDF, CSV, etc.) and what does not match.
form.successDetail: We reply within 24 hours on business days. Check your Spam folder too — the reply may come from noreply@investax.app or directly from the operator.
form.errorGeneric: The message could not be sent. Check your details and try again.
form.errorRateLimit: You have sent too many messages recently. Please try again in 15 minutes.
form.errorNetwork: Connection interrupted. Check your internet and try again.

noEmail.question: I didn't receive my payment confirmation email
noEmail.answer: Check your Spam folder. If it doesn't appear within 10 minutes, use the form above and include your email address and the approximate time of payment.

wrongCalc.question: My calculation seems wrong
wrongCalc.answer: Use the form above, pick the Help topic, and include a screenshot of the result plus (if possible) your anonymized statement. We investigate every discrepancy.

refund.question: I want a refund
refund.answer: We offer a 14-day no-questions-asked refund. Use the form above with the Help topic.

deleteAccount.question: How do I delete my account?
deleteAccount.answer: Go to Settings and click "Delete account". All your data will be permanently deleted.

mobileApp.question: Do you have a mobile app?
mobileApp.answer: Not yet, but the website works perfectly on mobile. You can add InvesTax to your home screen from your browser.
